name: PPK Camera Hardware Integration
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist upgrading a mapping drone with a high-resolution Sony A7R IV camera payload. To achieve survey-grade accuracy, the autopilot must trigger the camera and record the exact microsecond the flash hotshoe fires in the DataFlash log. Based on the hardware schematic at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/hardware_schematic.txt, configure the six required camera and servo parameters in QGroundControl. Create a commissioning report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ppk_integration_report.txt confirming the integration. The report must mention the camera model ('Sony') and the two physical ports used ('AUX 1' and 'AUX 5').
